plan.caption:
White Flare ETBs cost $146 sealed. Opening one averages $67. That gap is $79.

The math on this one is clean.
Booster EV: $7.48 per pack across 9 packs.
Sealed price beats open value by $79.
Verdict: Keep it sealed.

Top chase cards doing the heavy lifting:
Victini at $518. Reshiram ex at $488. Oshawott at $94.
Full breakdown is live at pokeev.com.

Save this before you crack a White Flare ETB.

Rip or keep, what are you doing with yours?

Follow @pokeev.tcg for the live Expected Value on every sealed set.
Link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.reason: Opening averages $67. Sealed sits at $146.|That $79 gap is the argument — don't rip it.
